Milton Katz, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Lorenzo Palomera.

Richard Lopatto, Esq. representing the Defendant Jill Boyer through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502-B, for settlement discussions.

Case settled, the trial date vacated. Settlement agreement filed in open court.
